𝗞𝗢𝗛𝗔𝗥𝗨 | Automated, local-first manga translation with ML-powered features and editable export options.  🔥 Super Hot!

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automated, local-first manga translation with ML-powered features and editable export options.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automatic detection of text regions, speech bubbles, and cleanup masks
✅ OCR for manga dialogue, captions, and other page text
✅ Inpainting to remove source lettering from the page
✅ Translation with local or remote LLM backends
✅ Advanced text rendering with vertical CJK and RTL support
✅ Codex image-to-image generation for end-to-end page redraws
✅ Layered PSD export with editable text
✅ Local HTTP API and MCP server for automation


╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 272 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 91 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Koharu is a Rust-based desktop application that automates the process of translating manga. It leverages machine learning models for text detection, OCR, inpainting to remove original text, and translation via LLMs, all running locally for privacy. The application supports advanced text rendering and offers features like layered PSD export for further editing.

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/mayocream/koharu

✅ Service creation, editing, and control

System Informer is a free, open-source Windows utility for monitoring system resources, debugging software, and detecting malware. It provides detailed insights into system activity, process management, network connections, and file usage, offering a more advanced alternative to the default Task Manager.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

FadCam is an open-source, ad-free Android application designed for multimedia recording. It offers advanced features such as background video recording, screen recording, live streaming capabilities, and remote camera control, all while prioritizing user privacy.

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automated code review and quality assurance for React applications, identifying potential bugs and bad practices before they become major issues.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Deterministic code scanning for React issues
✅ Covers state & effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility
✅ Works with all React frameworks and libraries (Next.js, Vite, React Native, etc.)
✅ CLI for quick audits
✅ Installable skill for coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
✅ GitHub Actions for CI integration
✅ Configurable rules

React Doctor is a tool that deterministically scans React codebases to identify issues related to state and effects, performance, architecture, security, and accessibility. It works across various React frameworks and libraries and can be integrated into development workflows via CLI, CI, or coding agents.
